summary: The integration test job timed out and was marked as a test failure; Docker/container errors (HTTP 500, missing containers, network not found) appear in the log and likely prevented services from starting.
root_cause: The test run exceeded its allowed time and timed out: "[2/23] [dubbo-samples-test-11137:1/1] TEST FAILURE: Run tests timeout, version: -Ddubbo.version=3.3.7-SNAPSHOT -Dspring.version=5.3.24 -Djava.version=21, please check logs: /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs".

evidence.quote: [2/23] [dubbo-samples-test-11137:1/1] TEST FAILURE: Run tests timeout, version: -Ddubbo.version=3.3.7-SNAPSHOT -Dspring.version=5.3.24 -Djava.version=21, please check logs: /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs
evidence.reason: Explicit message stating the test run timed out and was marked as a TEST FAILURE, pointing to logs.

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: received unexpected HTTP status: 500 Internal Server Error
evidence.reason: Shows Docker daemon returned an HTTP 500 error, indicating failures when interacting with Docker that could prevent services from starting.

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: No such container: dubbo-samples-test-11137--zookeeper-1
evidence.reason: Multiple 'No such container' messages indicate expected containers were not running/created during the test run.

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: network dubbo-samples-test-11137-21 not found
evidence.reason: Docker network required by the test was missing, which would prevent inter-container communication and service startup.

evidence.quote: time="2026-05-08T05:52:22Z" level=warning msg"/home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/docker-compose.yml: the attribute `version` is obsolete, it will be ignored, please remove it to avoid potential confusion
evidence.reason: docker-compose.yml contains an obsolete attribute warning which may indicate compose file compatibility issues.
Summarizes that one test failed and the run concluded with failures after the timeout.

suggested_fix: Inspect the logs at /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs to identify why containers (zookeeper, nacos, etc.) failed to start. Verify Docker daemon health and address the HTTP 500 errors; ensure required containers/networks are created. Remove the obsolete `version` attribute from docker-compose.yml if causing compatibility issues, and consider increasing the test timeout or adding retries for service startup.
